Tests the `Math.acos` function with a value slightly greater than 1 to ensure it returns NaN.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.acos` function in JavaScript. It uses the `assert` function to check that the result of `Math.acos` with an input slightly greater than 1 is not `NaN`. This test ensures that the `Math.acos` function handles edge cases correctly, specifically when the input is very close to the upper limit of its domain. The script is narrow in functionality, focusing solely on this specific mathematical operation and its expected output.
